question: How does this company actually make money by segment and geography?
why_it_matters: A convincing IC narrative starts from business economics rather than isolated line-item changes.
expected_evidence: Revenue by segment|geography exposure|major products|customer or channel concentration
confirms_or_disproves: Confirms whether the source signal maps to a material business driver.
story_use: Builds the business model section of the company story.

question: Is the revenue signal driven by volume price mix FX or acquisition?
why_it_matters: Revenue surprises are weak unless decomposed into sustainable drivers.
expected_evidence: Segment revenue|units or GMV|ASP or take rate|FX impact|organic growth bridge
confirms_or_disproves: Confirms or disproves durable demand and pricing power.
story_use: Explains whether growth is real demand or accounting or FX.

question: What caused the gross or operating margin move?
why_it_matters: Margin narratives need a causal bridge from price mix COGS input cost warranty incentives or opex.
confirms_or_disproves: Confirms or disproves operating leverage and margin durability.
story_use: Turns a margin signal into an operating story.

question: Do core financial KPIs agree across revenue gross profit operating income net income and cash flow?
why_it_matters: Large companies can have missing tags or partial metrics; the app should derive and reconcile before declaring gaps.
confirms_or_disproves: Confirms whether the KPI signal is complete and period aligned.
story_use: Gives the IC one-pager a coherent financial snapshot.

question: Is the cash or debt change operating cash generation financing working capital M&A or capital return?
why_it_matters: Cash balance changes can mislead unless reconciled to cash-flow and financing statements.
confirms_or_disproves: Confirms or disproves liquidity improvement and credit risk.
story_use: Builds equity optionality and credit downside story.

question: Is the share-count move true dilution buyback or security-basis mismatch?
why_it_matters: ADR ratios splits weighted-average basis and XBRL concepts can create false dilution signals.
expected_evidence: Ordinary shares|ADS ratio|weighted-average shares|period-end shares|repurchases|issuance|split history
confirms_or_disproves: Confirms or disproves dilution or capital return.

question: Did management give numeric guidance and did consensus revise afterward?
why_it_matters: Guidance matters only if exact metric period range and expectations reaction are captured point-in-time.
expected_evidence: Guidance quote|metric|period|range|speaker|pre and post consensus snapshots
story_use: Connects management outlook to market capture.

question: Did management repeat quantify or evade key commitments?
why_it_matters: Management tone is useful only when tied to measurable promises and later outcomes.
expected_evidence: Speaker quote|promise|deadline|specific KPI|prior promise outcome|Q&A specificity
story_use: Adds management-quality narrative without turning tone into proof.

question: Is the regulatory or legal signal official specific and financially material?
why_it_matters: Legal and policy stories need official corroboration and exposure sizing.
expected_evidence: Regulator release|court docket|issuer disclosure|affected product or region|financial exposure
confirms_or_disproves: Confirms or disproves material legal risk.
story_use: Separates real regulatory catalysts from boilerplate.

question: Which China ADR segment is driving the thesis?
why_it_matters: China ADR stories need segment and home-market context rather than ADR price action alone.
confirms_or_disproves: Confirms or disproves the China ADR operating driver.

question: Are China ADR margins driven by monetization mix subsidy discipline cloud scale or logistics cost?
why_it_matters: Segment mix and local competition often explain China internet margins better than consolidated totals.
expected_evidence: Segment revenue|segment EBITA|subsidies|logistics cost|cloud margin|international losses
confirms_or_disproves: Confirms or disproves margin durability by segment.
story_use: Links China ADR margin signals to competitive economics.

question: Does capital return actually reduce ADS or ordinary share count after ratio normalization?
why_it_matters: ADR buybacks need ADS ordinary-share and repurchase-table reconciliation.
expected_evidence: Buyback table|ADS ratio|ordinary shares|repurchased amount|cash balance|authorization remaining
confirms_or_disproves: Confirms or disproves per-share value accretion.
story_use: Connects buybacks to shareholder return story.

question: Are peers showing the same operating KPI trend in the same period?
why_it_matters: Peer read-through should compare operating metrics not just stock returns.
expected_evidence: Peer revenue|gross profit|margin|segment KPI|cash flow|same fiscal period

question: Is the company exposed to a geography macro shock or local demand cycle?
why_it_matters: A stock move can be driven by geography FX policy or local demand rather than company evidence.
expected_evidence: Local retail sales|FX|PMI|industry volume|policy event|local benchmark
story_use: Adds geography narrative and attribution context.
